claimText: The BRICS Land Restoration Partnership was launched at the 15th BRICS Agriculture Meet in Brazil to address land degradation and desertification.
evidenceExcerpt: BRICS Land Restoration Partnership was launched at the 15th BRICS Agriculture Meet in Brazil to address land degradation and desertification.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent environmental initiatives by BRICS.
distractorHooks: Launched in South Africa or Russia
Aimed primarily at water conservation instead of land degradation

claimText: The UN-India Global Capacity-Building Initiative aims to share India's development experiences with the Global South and is implemented through the UN India SDG Country Fund and ITEC.
evidenceExcerpt: UN-India Global Capacity-Building Initiative shares India's development experiences with the Global South, implemented via the UN India SDG Country Fund and ITEC.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's South-South cooperation mechanisms.
distractorHooks: Implemented solely by the World Bank
Excludes the Indian Technical and Economic Cooperation (ITEC) programme

claimText: The RECLAIM Framework was launched by the Coal Controller Organisation and the Heartfulness Institute to guide inclusive community engagement during mine closure and post-closure phases.
evidenceExcerpt: RECLAIM Framework was launched by the Coal Controller Organisation and Heartfulness Institute to guide community engagement during mine closure and post-closure phases.
examUse: Statement-based question on mining sector reforms and community engagement.
distractorHooks: Launched by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
Aimed at opening new coal mines
